meta.title: Arsène Fogue — Fullstack Developer & Product Manager
meta.description: Portfolio of Arsène Nelson Fogue Tiagho, fullstack developer and product manager based in Douala, Cameroon. 3+ years of experience, 10+ projects delivered.

hero.subtitle: Passionate about innovation, I leverage AI to optimize my workflows for architecture design, API development and intuitive interface creation.
hero.bio: Software engineer and Product Manager, I design robust, user-centered digital solutions.

about.heading: About
about.bio1: I'm Arsène Nelson Fogue Tiagho, a fullstack developer and Product Manager based in Douala, Cameroon. With a Software Engineering degree from the Institut Africain d'Informatique (IAI), I build robust web and mobile applications, from the database layer all the way to the user interface.
about.bio2: What sets me apart: I combine engineering with a product mindset — I analyse business needs, prioritise features and coordinate teams, not just write code. Curious and driven by innovation, I use AI as leverage to design solid architectures and ship faster without sacrificing quality.
about.bio3: Outside of code: 3D modelling, writing, reading and video games.
about.softSkills: Problem-solving · Time management · Communication · Organisation · Teamwork
